title: Greedy Algorithms and Exchange Arguments · Spiral Review
summary: Allocate rooms, bandwidth, and deadlines under competing local choices. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a greedy-design decision and proof notebook after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define a locally optimal choice and the remaining subproblem precisely.
Distinguish optimal substructure from the stronger greedy-choice property.
Transform an optimal solution to include the greedy choice without worsening it.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
